final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3×3 nine-grid poster layout for 小红书, designed to be cut into 9 individual square cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, ins风 editorial aesthetic with 治愈感 and sleep-wellness theme — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout; each grid cell is self-contained and centered; visible cell borders or gutters between every cell to allow clean cutting; no text or key elements placed near grid boundaries
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  Grid 1 (封面): large headline "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", visual elements: soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask — most eye-catching cell, hero layout
  Grid 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", illustration elements: phone, moon, sleepy-face character
  Grid 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", illustration elements: bedside lamp, warm yellow glow, curtains
  Grid 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", illustration elements: air conditioner, thermometer, blanket
  Grid 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", illustration elements: coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Grid 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", illustration elements: bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Grid 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", illustration elements: notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Grid 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", illustration elements: clock, moon, bed
  Grid 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer small text "收藏这组，今晚试试看", illustration elements: breathing wave lines, closed-eyes figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft sleep-wellness editorial backdrop per cell — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, calming, 治愈 nighttime atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white / 浅米色 / 淡燕麦色 / 浅焦糖色 as dominant tones, with small accents of deep brown for text; overall palette温柔治愈
Materials/textures: needs a light skeuomorphic illustration style with soft paper-like texture — exact grain and surface weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified per grid above:
  Grid 1: "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (large headline), "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" (subtitle)
  Grid 2: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" (title), "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" (body)
  Grid 3: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" (title), "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" (body)
  Grid 4: "3. 房间温度别太高" (title), "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" (body)
  Grid 5: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" (title), "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" (body)
  Grid 6: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" (title), "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" (body)
  Grid 7: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" (title), "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" (body)
  Grid 8: "7. 固定上床时间" (title), "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" (body)
  Grid 9: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" (title), "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" (body), "收藏这组，今晚试试看" (small footer)
Constraints: must preserve all 9 grid cells visible and clearly separated; all in-image text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters; each cell must read independently after cropping; text and key visuals must not bleed into grid boundary zones
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, overly decorative or cluttered layouts, English text, garbled characters, text placed on grid cut lines

  Grid 8: "7. 固定上床时间" (title), "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" (body)
